_comment: Reference cluster configurations for running this pipeline at different scales. Adjust to your Databricks workspace's available node types.

dev_test_cluster._comment: For quick iteration. In 01_big_data_generator.py, divide N_CUSTOMERS/N_PRODUCTS/N_ORDERS by 100 (~10K customers, ~500 products, ~200K orders, ~440K order_items).

full_scale_cluster._comment: For the full 1M customers / 50K products / 20M orders / ~45M order_items run (~8-10GB raw). Recommended minimum.

estimated_runtime.03_silver_transformation: 10-15 minutes (broadcast join + ROW_NUMBER dedup on 45M rows)

scale_down_for_testing._comment: Edit these constants at the top of 01_big_data_generator.py for a fast local/dev run
scale_down_for_testing.estimated_runtime_dev: 1-2 minutes total on a single-node cluster
